productDisplayName: Reebok Men Manza II Brown Sandals
description: If comfort is on your mind, these reebok Manza II sandals will transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish, lightweight and super comfy, they make you feel like you are walking on a bed of roses. Ruggedly crafted for casual wear,  these can be teamed with jeans or shorts for a cool casual look.UpperFabric upper for rugged feel and styleStrapson the forefoot and midfoot with foam at the bottom for added comfortAnkle strap to hold the foot firmly in placeBrand name on front and backMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortElevated textures on footbed for a massage-like feelOutsoleRubber outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfacesLugs on the periphery of the outsole for better traction
